hero.headline: AI systems, premium websites, and digital infrastructure for ambitious brands.
hero.subtitle: Chiti designs and builds intelligent digital systems across commerce, SaaS, automation, and modern web experiences.

services.title: What we build
services.subtitle: End-to-end digital systems for commerce, SaaS, AI, and brand-led experiences.
services.card02Desc: Custom AI systems that reduce manual work.
services.card03Desc: Product storytelling, checkout flows, WhatsApp inquiry, CRM-ready commerce.
services.card04Desc: Dense, scalable interfaces for data-heavy products.
services.card05Desc: WhatsApp, CRM, forms, lead capture, follow-ups, internal workflows.
services.card06Desc: Reusable brand/UI systems for faster future launches.

process.title: How we build
process.quote: We don't start with screens. We first understand the business, then design the system that should exist behind the interface.
process.step01Desc: Understand your goals, audit existing systems, and define measurable KPIs before writing a single line of code.
process.step02Desc: Design the system blueprint — data models, tech stack, integrations, and infrastructure that scales with your business.
process.step03Desc: Build the user-facing layer. UI design, interaction patterns, brand implementation, and front-end engineering.
process.step04Desc: Connect workflows, CRM pipelines, AI agents, and third-party tools into a unified operational system.
process.step05Desc: Deploy, monitor performance, run growth experiments, and iterate based on real usage data.

work.title: Curating Digital Excellence
work.subtitle: A curated selection of projects where strategy meets craft, and ambition meets execution.

about.title: The Core Philosophy
about.subtitle: Chiti (चिति): The Supreme Consciousness. Universal Intelligence. The primal force that designs, structures, and gives form to the universe.
about.philosophyBody:
We do not just build websites; we architect digital infrastructure. Named after the cosmic principle of conscious creation, Chiti Technologies was founded to bring absolute precision, structural intelligence, and flawless engineering to the digital economy.

We look at businesses not as a collection of isolated pages, but as living, interconnected ecosystems. Our mission is to transform manual friction into automated flow, translating complex operational logic into beautiful, high-frequency digital realities.
about.collectiveBody:
We operate as a high-frequency, decentralized collective of elite engineers, designers, and systems architects. By abandoning traditional agency bloat, we focus entirely on raw digital craft.

We partner exclusively with ambitious brands, high-growth enterprises, and luxury innovators who demand technical excellence and absolute strategic clarity.
about.pillar01Desc: Every line of code, database model, and automation pipeline is built with intent. We design systems that don't just solve today's bottlenecks but gracefully adapt to future scale.
about.pillar02Desc: We are obsessed with performance metrics. Sub-second latency, robust security protocols, and 99.9% uptime SLAs are our baseline standards, not an afterthought.
about.pillar03Desc: We believe the highest form of sophistication is simplicity. We take intricate business mechanics and package them into intuitive, editorial-grade user interfaces that feel effortless to navigate.
about.blueprintBody: From custom automated workflows and tokenized CRM pipelines to immersive, components-driven design languages, we build the digital backbone that allows your business to evolve.
about.blueprintTagline: Strong systems. Sharp interfaces. Uncompromising results.

contact.title: Tell us about your project
contact.subtitle: We work with founders, startups, and growing businesses looking for design that stands out and systems that scale.
contact.callDesc: Book a free discovery call. We'll discuss your project, answer your questions, and see if we're the right fit.
contact.formPlaceholderMessage: Briefly describe your goals, timeline, and any existing brand assets...
contact.fitTitle: Is Chiti Technologies the right fit?
contact.fit01Desc: For companies looking to redefine their visual soul.
contact.fit02Desc: Scalable design systems built for long-term growth.
contact.fit03Desc: Breaking the grid with intentional and elite layouts.
contact.responseDesc: Typically within 24-48 hours. We value deep work and intentional responses over speed.
contact.quote: Whether you need a full website, a product redesign, or a long-term design partner, we'd love to hear from you.

footer.description: Chiti Technologies builds AI systems, premium websites, commerce infrastructure, automation workflows, and scalable product interfaces for ambitious brands.

founder.name: Prabhakar Kumar
founder.title: Founder & Systems Architect — Chiti Technologies
founder.copy: Chiti Technologies is built with one belief: digital products should be beautiful, intelligent, ethical, and commercially useful. We don't build template websites. We build systems that help brands operate, sell, and scale.

ladder.title: Engagement Models
ladder.subtitle: Every engagement is custom. These tiers describe scope, not packages.
ladder.tier01Desc: Website, landing page, brand direction, launch-ready digital presence.
ladder.tier02Desc: Ecommerce, SaaS dashboards, AI agents, workflow automation, internal tools.
ladder.tier03Desc: Funnels, CRM, WhatsApp automation, retargeting, analytics, conversion systems.
ladder.cta: Discuss the right system for your brand

cta.headline: Tell us what you want to build.
cta.subtitle: Whether you need a premium website, an AI workflow, or a full digital system, Chiti can help you turn the idea into working infrastructure.
